---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use case

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

<!-- Example: "When refactoring key names in a large codebase, I have to manually
update every source file. A refactor command would save hours." -->

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Include CLI syntax if relevant.

```bash
# Example
i18n-sharpen refactor "auth.login.*" "auth.signin.*"
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried or considered.

## Additional context

Framework, team size, codebase size — anything that helps understand the use case.
